title: Professional Email Writer
description: Write any professional email in seconds with perfect tone and structure.
prompt:
You are an expert business communication specialist. Write a professional email based on the following details:

Context: [describe the situation]
Recipient: [who are you emailing]
Purpose: [what do you want to achieve]
Tone: [formal/semi-formal/friendly]
Key points to cover: [list your main points]

Requirements:
- Subject line that gets opened
- Clear, concise body paragraphs
- Strong call to action
- Professional closing
- Keep it under 200 words unless the context requires more

Write the complete email now.

title: SEO Blog Post Generator
description: Generate a complete, SEO-optimized blog post on any topic.
prompt:
Act as an expert content writer and SEO specialist. Write a comprehensive blog post on: [topic]

Target keyword: [primary keyword]
Secondary keywords: [list 3-5 related keywords]
Target audience: [describe your reader]
Word count: [desired length]
Tone: [informative/conversational/authoritative]

Structure the post with:
1. Attention-grabbing H1 title (include primary keyword)
2. Compelling introduction with a hook
3. Well-organized body with H2 and H3 subheadings
4. Actionable tips or insights in each section
5. Real examples or statistics where relevant
6. Strong conclusion with a clear takeaway
7. SEO meta description (150-160 characters)

Ensure natural keyword placement, short paragraphs for readability, and a writing style that keeps readers engaged from start to finish.

title: AI Prompt Optimizer
description: Transform weak prompts into powerful, precise instructions that get perfect results.
prompt:
You are a world-class prompt engineer who designs prompts used by Fortune 500 companies. Analyze and completely rewrite the following prompt to make it dramatically more effective:

Original prompt: [paste your current prompt here]
AI model target: [Claude/ChatGPT/Gemini]
Desired output type: [what you want the AI to produce]
Use case: [how you will use the output]
Current problems with the output: [what is wrong with what you are getting now]

Rewrite the prompt with:
1. Clear role assignment for the AI
2. Precise context and background information
3. Specific output format requirements
4. Examples of desired tone and style
5. Constraints and boundaries
6. Quality criteria the output must meet
7. Step-by-step reasoning instructions if needed

Then explain what changes you made, why they help, and provide both a full and a quick version of the optimized prompt.

title: Academic Essay Writer
description: Write well-structured, research-backed academic essays on any subject.
prompt:
You are a distinguished academic writer with expertise across multiple disciplines. Write a comprehensive essay on:

Topic: [your essay topic]
Academic level: [high school/undergraduate/graduate/PhD]
Word count: [required length]
Citation style: [APA/MLA/Chicago/Harvard]
Subject area: [discipline or course]
Argument or thesis direction: [the position you want to argue, or leave blank for balanced analysis]

Essay structure:
1. Introduction with a compelling hook and clear thesis statement
2. Literature review or background context
3. Well-developed body paragraphs with topic sentences, evidence, and analysis
4. Counterargument and rebuttal section
5. Synthesis and discussion of implications
6. Conclusion that reinforces thesis and provides forward-looking perspective
7. References list formatted correctly

Ensure academic language, logical flow, critical thinking, and proper citation integration throughout.

title: Email Marketing Campaign
description: Write a complete email marketing campaign sequence that converts subscribers.
prompt:
You are a direct response email marketing expert. Create a complete email marketing campaign for:

Product or service: [what you are selling]
Price point: [cost]
Target audience: [describe ideal customer]
Campaign goal: [launch/nurture/win-back/promotion]
Number of emails: [3/5/7/10 email sequence]
Sending schedule: [daily/every other day/weekly]

For each email provide subject line (plus 2 A/B variations), preview text, opening hook, body copy, call to action, and P.S. line.

Sequence structure: Welcome, value-driven story, address objection, social proof, urgency and final offer.

Write in a conversational, human tone. No corporate speak.

title: Brand Voice and Tone Guide
description: Define your brand's unique voice, tone, and messaging framework.
prompt:
You are a senior brand strategist. Develop a comprehensive brand voice and tone guide for:

Brand name: [company name]
Industry: [market sector]
Mission: [what you stand for]
Core values: [list 3-5 values]
Target audience: [who you serve]
Brand personality words: [3-5 adjectives]

Deliver: brand personality archetype with rationale, voice characteristics, tone variations for different contexts, vocabulary guide (words we use vs avoid), writing principles with before/after examples, dos and don'ts, sample copy across 5 formats, and guidance for external writers.

title: ATS Resume Optimizer
description: Optimize your resume to pass Applicant Tracking Systems and get more interviews.
prompt:
You are a professional resume writer and ATS specialist. Optimize my resume for ATS systems:

Current resume: [paste your current resume]
Target job posting: [paste the full job description]
Target company: [company name]
Target role: [exact job title]
Years of experience: [number]
Top skills to highlight: [list your strongest relevant skills]

Provide an ATS score analysis, missing keywords, an optimized resume rewrite with achievement-based bullets in CAR format, an optimized skills section, a targeted summary statement, red flags to fix, and formatting rules. Target minimum 80% keyword match to the job description.

title: LinkedIn Profile Optimizer
description: Transform your LinkedIn profile into a magnet for recruiters and opportunities.
prompt:
You are a LinkedIn optimization expert. Completely optimize my LinkedIn profile:

Current headline: [your current headline]
Current about section: [paste current about]
Current experience descriptions: [paste 2-3 recent roles]
Industry: [your field]
Career goal: [what roles or opportunities you want]
Top 5 skills: [your strongest skills]
Key achievement: [your proudest professional accomplishment]

Rewrite the headline (220 char max), about section (2600 char max storytelling structure), experience descriptions with quantified results, top 50 skills to add, featured section ideas, and engagement tips for algorithm visibility.

title: User Research Interview Guide
description: Design a comprehensive user research interview to uncover real user needs.
prompt:
You are a senior UX researcher. Design a complete user research study for:

Product or feature: [describe what you are researching]
Research goal: [what decision does this research inform]
User type: [who are the participants]
Research phase: [discovery/usability/validation]
Key assumptions to test: [hypotheses you want to validate or invalidate]

Deliver a research plan, a recruitment screener (8-10 questions), a complete discussion guide (warm-up, context, core deep-dive, task-based exploration, wrap-up), an observation framework, an analysis template, and a report template. All questions open-ended, no leading questions.

title: Wireframe and Prototype Brief
description: Create a detailed wireframe brief that aligns design and development teams.
prompt:
You are a senior UX designer. Write a comprehensive wireframe brief for:

Product: [app/website/feature]
Platform: [web/iOS/Android/responsive]
User story: [as a [user], I want to [action] so that [benefit]]
Scope: [which screens or flows]
Business objective: [what metric this improves]

Provide a flow diagram, screen-by-screen breakdown (purpose, elements, content hierarchy, interactive behavior, states), navigation patterns, a component inventory, accessibility notes, edge cases, and design decision rationale.

title: Expert Code Debugger
description: Diagnose and fix any coding bug with systematic debugging methodology.
prompt:
You are a senior software engineer with deep expertise in debugging complex systems. Debug the following issue:

Code with bug: [paste your code]
Language and version: [e.g. Python 3.11, Node.js 20]
Framework: [if applicable]
Error message: [exact error output]
Expected behavior: [what should happen]
Actual behavior: [what is happening instead]
What I have already tried: [debugging steps attempted]

Provide a root cause analysis, step-by-step explanation of what's wrong, fixed code with comments, why the fix works, edge cases to test, and prevention tips for this class of bug.

title: REST API Design and Documentation
description: Design a clean, well-documented REST API following industry best practices.
prompt:
You are a backend architect who designs APIs used by millions of developers. Design a complete REST API for:

Application: [describe your application]
Core resources: [main entities, e.g. users, products, orders]
Authentication method: [JWT/OAuth2/API key]
Database: [PostgreSQL/MongoDB/MySQL/etc]
Language/framework: [Node.js Express/Python FastAPI/Go/etc]

Design the resource structure, endpoint documentation per resource (method, URL, request/response schema, status codes, rate limiting), authentication flow, error response standard, pagination design, filtering/sorting conventions, an OpenAPI 3.0 spec outline, and security considerations.

title: Investor Pitch Deck Creator
description: Build a compelling investor pitch deck that gets meetings with top VCs.
prompt:
You are a startup advisor who has helped companies raise from top-tier VCs. Create a compelling investor pitch deck for:

Company: [name and one-line description]
Stage: [pre-seed/seed/Series A]
Funding ask: [amount raising]
Product: [what you build]
Market: [who buys it]
Traction: [any revenue, users, growth]
Team: [founder backgrounds]

Create a complete 12-slide deck structure: cover, problem, solution, market size (TAM/SAM/SOM), product, business model, traction, go-to-market, competition, team, financials, and the ask. For each slide give the headline, key content, and data to include.

title: Standard Operating Procedure Writer
description: Create clear, comprehensive SOPs that any team member can follow.
prompt:
You are an operations specialist who has built SOPs for scaling companies. Write a complete Standard Operating Procedure for:

Process name: [name of the process]
Department: [which team owns this]
Frequency: [how often this is done]
Trigger: [what starts this process]
People involved: [roles that participate]
Systems used: [tools, software, platforms]

Create the header section, process overview, a RACI roles matrix, numbered step-by-step instructions with decision points and time estimates, quality checks, a troubleshooting guide, and a glossary.
